sections.paragraph:
adjective

chained; imprisoned

masculine noun אסור (>>איסור)

prohibition, ban, forbiddance, disallowance, proscription, interdiction, interdict, illegalization; taboo, tabu; embargo

adjective

forbidden, prohibited, unallowed, not allowed, banned, unpermitted, proscribed, illicit

masculine noun אסורים

chains, fetters, bonds, shackles

adverb

it is forbidden, No , it is prohibited, it is not allowed, illicit
